reviews.text: Amazing service very reliable highly recommend

I found them through Thumbtack and had Ben come over for an estimate. He was very courteous and understanding of my needs was very patient and explaining all costs and tried everything To make installation cost effective work for me, unfortunately I ended up using another company, but would definitely recommend them for future work

They answered the phone on the first call. They listened to my issue. Were able to come same day to assess the problem.  Was friendly and professional in answering all our questions and concerned being our first time requesting garage repairs/replacement.
They were able to fit us into their schedule within two days. They arrived on time and worked quickly. Got the job done in less than an hour and a half.
They seem professional. I would highly recommend them.
Definitely truly recommend Ben! He’s very responsive and willing to work with you. His prices are fair!
Great communication, great work. All around decent and a joy to work with. If you need your Garage door repaired contact these guys, they will take care of you.

EXCELLENT SERVICE .
Prompt communication and a dedicated team— these guys love what they do!

We worked with Ben from smart garage doors and he helped us stay n hour budget and delivered a great product!

Would recommend to friends, neighbors and people who like high quality service with a smile .
Great service and communication. Made repairs same day and at a much better price than competitors in the area. Will use this company again.
Great company with knowledgeable personnel. Highly recommend!

Ben did an excellent job fixing the garage door stripping at our new home. The door came with some damage, and the original stripping wasn’t flush, leaving a gap that let cold air in during the winter. Ben was incredibly knowledgeable, easy to talk to, and explained everything clearly. The final result looks great and has already made a big difference. Highly recommend his work.

Great quick service , put in my request on thumb tack. They showed up in less then a hour. The repair technician was very detailed in his description of how he would fix my garage door issue and gave me a quote agreed upon. They come with replacement parts ready(at a low cost) parts was just 15 bucks extra for me. Def recommend these guys for your garage repairs.
Honest, reliable, professional and very accessible and accommodating. They are by far the best at what they do.

excellent service with fair prices and fast service
recommending to all
